title: The Strangest Person
description: I want to tell you about someone I knew, a long time ago, before you, before the rank, and before any of the stories I've already told you. Back when I was seventeen and thought I understood what dangerous looked like.

title: Nix in Combat
description: The thing about Nix is the constant hum of activity. As if stillness was impossible for them.

title: The Pit
description: The thing about The Pit is that it was patient.

title: The Wagon
description: The archive had built a separate shelf for them almost immediately, labeled simply Cinder.

title: The Joining
description: She had named her child for the cold grey morning of their birth. She had not known, then, what was beginning.
